description: Runtime configuration edited via the Settings UI. Secrets are included in GET responses.

agent.description: Defaults for the main agent loop (model id and safety caps).

llm_min_interval_ms.description: Minimum gap between consecutive LLM calls in milliseconds (0 disables pacing).
llm_min_interval_ms.title: LLM min interval ms

llm_retry_base_ms.description: Initial backoff between LLM retries in milliseconds.
llm_retry_base_ms.title: LLM retry base ms

llm_retry_max.description: Retries after retryable LLM errors such as HTTP 429 before failing the turn.
llm_retry_max.title: LLM retry max

max_tokens_per_turn.description: Upper bound on total tokens (prompt + completion) the model may use in one agent step.
max_tokens_per_turn.title: Max tokens per turn

max_turns.description: Hard cap on ReAct iterations (LLM calls plus tool rounds) for one user request.
max_turns.title: Max turns

model.description: Logical model id from the models list used when the client omits a model.
model.title: Default model

agent.title: ReAct agent

browser.description: Interactive browser automation tool (requires the browser build tag; drives a local Chrome/Chromium via chromedp).

enabled.description: Turns on the interactive browser tools (navigate, click, fill, screenshot, ...) for eligible builds.
enabled.title: Enabled

executable_path.description: Optional path to a specific Chrome/Chromium binary. Empty lets chromedp auto-detect an installed browser.
executable_path.title: Browser executable

headless.description: Run the browser without a visible window. Enabled by default; disable to watch the automated session.
headless.title: Headless

timeout_seconds.description: Per-action timeout for navigation, clicks, and other browser operations.
timeout_seconds.title: Action timeout (seconds)

browser.title: Browser tool

compaction.description: Summarize older turns when the conversation approaches the model context window.

enabled.description: Turns on auto-compaction; only fires near the context window.
enabled.title: Enabled

keep_last_turns.description: Most recent user turns preserved verbatim.
keep_last_turns.title: Keep last turns

max_tokens.description: Completion token cap for the summary generation.
max_tokens.title: Summary max tokens

model.description: Model override for the summary pass; empty uses agent model.
model.title: Compaction model

threshold_percent.description: Trigger at this percent of usable context (max_context_tokens - max_tokens); 50..99.
threshold_percent.title: Threshold percent

compaction.title: Automatic context compaction

gateways.description: Telegram bot gateway (requires the gateway or gateway.telegram build tag).

admins.description: Telegram user IDs with elevated rights; admins always pass access checks.
admins.title: Admins

chats.description: Override isolation and access for specific chats.

access.description: Per-chat access override: all, admins, or group:<name>.
access.title: Access

chat_id.description: Telegram chat id; negative for groups and supergroups.
chat_id.title: Chat ID

chats.title: Per-chat overrides

default_access.description: Fallback access level for chats without an override: all, admins, or group:<name>.
default_access.title: Default access

default_isolation.description: Fallback session isolation for group chats.
default_isolation.title: Default isolation

enabled.description: Run the Telegram bot (requires the gateway or gateway.telegram build tag).
enabled.title: Enabled

proxy.description: Optional outbound proxy for Telegram API requests. Use http, https, socks5, or socks5h.
proxy.title: Proxy

rich_messages.description: Use Bot API 10.1 Rich Messages: the agent's native Markdown renders verbatim, tool activity streams as a Thinking placeholder, and executed tools show in a collapsible block. Falls back to legacy formatting if unsupported.
rich_messages.title: Rich messages

token.description: BotFather token. Optional here — leave empty to read it from the TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN environment variable (e.g. via .env). Secret: when set it is stored in config.yaml and shown in full.
token.title: Bot token

user_groups.description: Named sets of user IDs referenced by access as group:<name>.

name.description: Name referenced by access as group:<name>.
name.title: Group name

user_ids.description: Telegram numeric user IDs that belong to this group.
user_ids.title: User IDs

user_groups.title: User groups

gateways.title: Messenger gateways

instructions.description: Files read from the session working directory and appended to the system prompt as project instructions (AGENTS.md-compatible).

files.description: Filenames relative to session CWD to read as instructions. Defaults to ["AGENTS.md"].
files.title: Instruction files

instructions.title: Instructions

logger.description: Process log level, outputs, and rotation.

file.description: Destination file when outputs include file.
file.title: Log file path

format.description: text for human logs; json for structured logs.
format.title: Format

level.description: Minimum severity written to configured outputs.
level.title: Level

rotation.description: Size-based rotation when logging to a file.

max_files.description: How many rotated segments to retain; 0 uses logger defaults.
max_files.title: Max files

max_size_mb.description: Rotate after the file reaches this size; 0 uses logger defaults.
max_size_mb.title: Max file size (MB)

rotation.title: Rotation

logger.title: Logger

mcp_servers.description: Model Context Protocol servers started or contacted for new sessions.

args.description: Argv passed after command for stdio MCP servers.
args.title: Arguments

command.description: Executable for stdio transport (leave empty when using http url).
command.title: Command

env.description: Extra environment variables for the stdio child process.

name.description: Environment variable name passed to the MCP process.
name.title: Variable name

env.title: Environment

headers.description: Optional headers sent with MCP HTTP requests.

name.description: HTTP header name for MCP HTTP transports.
name.title: Header name

headers.title: HTTP headers

name.description: Stable id referenced by the agent; must be unique in this list.
name.title: Server name

type.description: stdio runs a local command; http connects to a remote MCP endpoint.
type.title: Server type

url.description: HTTP(S) endpoint when type selects an HTTP-based MCP server.
url.title: MCP URL

mcp_servers.title: MCP servers

memory.description: Optional memory copilot (requires memory build tag and provider).

copilot_max_tokens.description: Completion token cap for memory copilot calls.
copilot_max_tokens.title: Copilot max tokens

dir.description: Filesystem root for memory markdown; empty uses ${FOXXYCODE_HOME}/memory.
dir.title: Memory root

enabled.description: Turns on the memory copilot for eligible builds.
enabled.title: Enabled

max_search_hits.description: Maximum snippets returned by memory search tools.
max_search_hits.title: Max search hits

model.description: Logical model override for memory LLM calls; empty uses agent model.
model.title: Memory model

persist_max_turns.description: Bounds persist-side LLM rounds in the memory loop.
persist_max_turns.title: Persist max turns

recall_max_turns.description: Bounds recall-side LLM rounds in the memory loop.
recall_max_turns.title: Recall max turns

memory.title: Long-term memory

models.description: Named model entries the agent and UI can select; ids reference provider prefixes.

max_context_tokens.description: Optional UI hint for composer context bar; 0 means derive from provider metadata when available.
max_context_tokens.title: Max context tokens (UI hint)

max_tokens.description: Upper bound on completion tokens the model may emit for one assistant message.
max_tokens.title: Max tokens

model.description: Logical id in the form provider/api-model-id; must match a provider name prefix.
model.title: Model id

multimodal.description: When true, the model accepts image or file inputs in addition to text. The UI will offer file attachment for messages sent with this model.
multimodal.title: Multimodal

reasoning_default.description: Reasoning level pre-selected for new chats with this model. Must be one of the resolved reasoning levels; ignored otherwise.
reasoning_default.title: Default reasoning level

reasoning_levels.description: Optional override of the reasoning levels offered for this model (e.g. low, medium, high). Leave empty to auto-detect from the model id; an explicit empty list hides the reasoning selector.
reasoning_levels.title: Reasoning levels

temperature.description: Sampling temperature for this logical model (0 = deterministic, higher = more random).
temperature.title: Temperature

models.title: Logical models

prompts.description: Built-in system prompt files relative to dir.

agent_prompt.description: Filename for the main agent system prompt.
agent_prompt.title: Agent prompt file

dir.description: Optional override directory for prompt markdown files.
dir.title: Prompts directory

per_provider.description: Select a system prompt tuned to the active model family (falls back to the shared prompt).

enabled.description: Use a per-family prompt file (agent.<family>.md) when available.
enabled.title: Enabled

per_provider.title: Per-provider prompts

prompts.title: Prompts

providers.description: API credentials and transport selection for upstream LLM vendors.

api_base.description: Optional override of the default API base URL for this provider. Ignored for neuraldeep, which always uses https://api.neuraldeep.ru/v1.
api_base.title: API base URL

api_key.description: You may set a literal key, reference ${ENV} in YAML (expanded when the file is loaded), or leave empty so the process reads the conventional NAME_API_KEY variable derived from the provider name (see provider name description).
api_key.title: API key

api_key_command.description: Optional credential-helper command. When api_key is empty it is run via the shell and its trimmed stdout is used as the key (like git/docker credential helpers or AWS credential_process), letting the provider fetch short-lived or login-issued keys without storing a static secret. On failure resolution falls back to the conventional NAME_API_KEY variable.
api_key_command.title: API key command

name.description: Logical id used in model ids (provider/model-id). ASCII letters, digits, hyphen, and underscore only; must start with a letter. When api_key is empty, the runtime reads the key from the environment variable NAME_API_KEY (NAME is this field in uppercase with hyphens mapped to underscores).
name.title: Provider name

proxy.description: Optional per-provider outbound proxy. Use http:// or https:// for an HTTP proxy, or socks5:// / socks5h:// for SOCKS5 (socks5h resolves hostnames via the proxy). Leave empty for a direct connection.
proxy.title: HTTP or SOCKS proxy

type.description: Wire protocol for this provider entry.
type.title: Provider type

providers.title: LLM providers

scheduler.description: Cron-style scheduled jobs (requires scheduler build tag).

enabled.description: When true, this process may run the scheduler daemon and REST.
enabled.title: Enabled

retain_sessions.description: How many completed scheduler session folders to keep per job id.
retain_sessions.title: Retain sessions

scheduler.title: Scheduler

sessions.description: Where persisted chat bundles are stored.

dir.description: Override sessions root; empty resolves under FOXXYCODE_HOME.
dir.title: Sessions directory

sessions.title: Sessions

skills.description: Slash commands and skill packs discovered from these directories.

dirs.description: Search paths for skills. Defaults: ~/.agents/skills (global, shared with npx skills / npx skillsbd), ${FOXXYCODE_HOME}/skills (foxxycode-specific), ${CWD}/.foxxycode/skills (project-local). ${FOXXYCODE_HOME} and ${CWD} expand at runtime.
dirs.title: Skill directories

skills.title: Skills

title.description: Generate a short LLM thread title after the first exchange in a fresh, non-pinned session.

enabled.description: Turns on backend auto-title generation for all clients.
enabled.title: Enabled

max_tokens.description: Completion token cap for the title generation.
max_tokens.title: Title max tokens

model.description: Model override for the title pass; empty uses agent model. A small, cheap model is a good choice.
model.title: Title model

title.title: Automatic session title

tools.description: Filesystem and shell policy for built-in tools.

command_allowlist.description: If non-empty, only these shell command prefixes may run without extra policy.
command_allowlist.title: Command allowlist

permission_mode.description: Controls when the agent asks for user approval before running tools. "ask": approve commands and writes. "accept_edits": auto-approve writes, approve commands. "bypass": skip all prompts.
permission_mode.title: Permission mode

tools.title: Tools and permissions

ui.description: Embedded SPA preferences for desktop and HTTP UI.

locale.description: UI locale for the embedded SPA. Empty means auto-detect from the system or browser locale.
locale.title: UI language

send_mode.description: How the main chat composer submits a message. "enter": Enter sends (Shift/Ctrl+Enter insert a newline). "ctrl_enter": Ctrl/Cmd+Enter sends (Enter inserts a newline). "off": disable keyboard send (Send button only).
send_mode.title: Sending messages

ui.title: UI

title: FoxxyCode config
